Items.Title: 如何在 Dev.to 上启用暗模式？ | How to enable dark mode on Dev.to ?
Items.Description:
卡马尔纳延

发表于您好，如果您的眼睛在灯光模式下也很痛，请持续盯着屏幕。

或者你和我一样是一个喜欢黑暗模式的开发者。 那么这个博客适合你。

关于此的早期博客已经过时，非常抱歉......

所以，我决定为你制作一个新的更新版。 就是这样 ！

所以去你的 dev.to > profile section > Edit profile

点击自定义>暗模式，你就完成了。

保存后刷新，你会看到黑暗模式开启。

如果这对您有帮助，请留下一个赞，并关注更多。 退出，

卡马尔🏄‍♂️

让-米歇尔法亚德🇫🇷🇩🇪🇬🇧🇪🇸⇨🇴 - 一旦暂停，kamalthedev 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，kamalthedev 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，kamalthedev 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 kamalthedev 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 kamalthedev 的方法：

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 kamalthedev 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Kamal Nayan

Posted on Dec 16

Hi there, if your eyes also hurt with the light mode , continuous starring at the screen.

Or you are like me a dev who is a fan of dark mode. Then this blog is for you.

The earlier blogs on this are outdated sorry very ...

So, I decided to craft a new updated one for you. Heres , how !

So go to your dev.to > profile section > Edit profile

Click on Customization > Dark mode and you are done .

Refresh after saving and you shall see the dark mode on.

Please leave a like, if this helped and follow for more. Signing off ,

kamal 🏄‍♂️

Items.Title: 在 React.js 和 Node 服务器中使用 Socket.io 创建实时发布应用程序。 (Server Side Tutorial) （服务器端教程） | Create a Real-time Posting App with Socket.io in React.js and Node server. (Server Side Tutorial)
Items.Description:
这里只是服务器端教程，你可以在下面找到我的 react.js 客户端教程：

介绍

  • 为什么我们需要实时发布？

实时发布是指用户无需手动刷新即可在网站上发布和查看新内容的能力。 这是通过使用 web 技术（例如websockets ）实现的，它允许服务器和客户端实时通信。

  • 其他项目实时发帖可以怎么做？

实时发布在许多不同类型的 Web 应用程序中都很有用。 例如，它可用于聊天应用程序以即时发送和接收消息，用于社交媒体应用程序以实时显示新帖子和更新，以及用于在线协作工具以实时共享和编辑文档。

构建一个简单的节点服务器

请继续阅读我的另一篇文章，该文章充分描述了如何制作一个简单的节点服务器框架。 下方链接：

完成构建节点服务器框架后，您现在可以将Socket.io包添加到您的服务器。

现在在你的 Server.js 或 Server.ts 中配置 socket.io

// Import socket.io package import { Server } from " socket.io " ; // Configure io with Server from socket.io const io = new Server ( process . env . SOCKET_IO_PORT , { cors : { origin : [ process . env . CLIENT_URL ], credentials : true } }); // Get a log when a connection is built from clients. io . on ( ' connection ' , ( socket ) => { console . log ( ' A user connected ' ); });

让我们创建一个 POST 端点，以在用户完成创建帖子时创建新帖子。

app . post ( ' /post ' , async ( req , res ) => { try { const newPost = { /* post data */ }; // Save the newPost to your database // After newPost saved to database, send the response res . json ({ message : ' New Post Created Successfully! ' }); } catch ( e ) { res . json ({ message : ' New Post Created Failed! ' }); } });

是时候通过 socket.io 向所有客户端发送新帖子了。 在保存到数据库和发送响应之间添加。 因为将 newPost 保存到数据库后意味着没有错误发生，因此我们现在可以将 newPost 发送给客户端。 如果有错误，我们会捕获它并发送错误响应

 // Save the newPost to your database io . emit ( ' new_post ' , newPost ); // After newPost saved to database, send the response

这是没有注释的完整代码：

 import express from " express " ; import cors from ' cors ' ; import dotenv from " dotenv " ; import { Server } from " socket.io " ; dotenv . config () const app = express (); app . use ( express . json ()); app . use ( cors ()) const io = new Server ( process . env . SOCKET_IO_PORT , { cors : { origin : [ process . env . CLIENT_URL ], credentials : true } }); io . on ( ' connection ' , ( socket ) => { console . log ( ' A user connected ' ); }); app . post ( ' /post ' , async ( req , res ) => { try { const newPost = { /* post data */ }; // Save the newPost to your database io . emit ( ' new_post ' , newPost ); res . json ({ message : ' New Post Created Successfully! ' }); } catch ( e ) { res . json ({ message : ' New Post Created Failed! ' }); } }); app . listen ( process . env . PORT , () => { console . log ( `SERVER IS RUNNING AT PORT ${ process . env . PORT } ` ); });

结论

总之，实时发布通过使 Web 应用程序更具交互性和响应性来增强用户体验。 它还允许用户之间更有效的通信和协作。

这里只是服务器端教程，你可以在下面找到我的 react.js 客户端教程：

阿西什·库马尔·萨胡 - 一旦暂停，luckey 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，luckey 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，luckey 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 luckey 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是标记 luckey 的方法：

报告其他不当行为

不屈不挠的 luckey 将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Here is only server side tutorial, you can find my react.js client side tutorial below:

Introduction

  • Why we need real-time posting?

Real-time posting refers to the ability for users to post and view new content on a website without the need for manual refreshing. This is made possible by using web technologies such as websockets, which allow the server and client to communicate in real-time.

  • How other projects real-time posting can do?

Real-time posting is useful in many different types of web applications. For example, it can be used in chat applications to instantly send and receive messages, in social media applications to display new posts and updates in real-time, and in online collaboration tools to share and edit documents in real-time.

Build a simple Node Server

Please ahead to my another article which fully describes how to make a simple Node Server skeleton. Link below:

Once you finished building a Node Server skeleton, you can now add Socket.io package to your server.

Now configure socket.io in your Server.js or Server.ts

// Import socket.io package
import { Server } from "socket.io"; // Configure io with Server from socket.io
const io = new Server(process.env.SOCKET_IO_PORT, { cors: { origin: [process.env.CLIENT_URL], credentials: true }
}); // Get a log when a connection is built from clients.
io.on('connection', (socket) => { console.log('A user connected');
});

Let's create a POST endpoint to create a new post from a user finishes creating a post.

app.post('/post', async (req, res) => { try { const newPost = { /* post data */ }; // Save the newPost to your database // After newPost saved to database, send the response res.json({ message: 'New Post Created Successfully!' }); } catch (e) { res.json({ message: 'New Post Created Failed!' }); }
});

It's time to emit the new post to all the clients through socket.io. Add between save to database and send response. Because after save the newPost to database means there is no error happened, thus we can now emit the newPost to clients now. If there is an error, we would catch it and send the error response

// Save the newPost to your database io.emit('new_post', newPost); // After newPost saved to database, send the response

Here is the full code without comments: 

import express from "express";
import cors from 'cors';
import dotenv from "dotenv";
import { Server } from "socket.io"; dotenv.config() const app = express();
app.use(express.json()); app.use(cors()) const io = new Server(process.env.SOCKET_IO_PORT, { cors: { origin: [process.env.CLIENT_URL], credentials: true }
}); io.on('connection', (socket) => { console.log('A user connected');
}); app.post('/post', async (req, res) => { try { const newPost = { /* post data */ }; // Save the newPost to your database io.emit('new_post', newPost); res.json({ message: 'New Post Created Successfully!' }); } catch (e) { res.json({ message: 'New Post Created Failed!' }); }
}); app.listen(process.env.PORT, () => { console.log(`SERVER IS RUNNING AT PORT ${process.env.PORT}`);
});

Conclusion

In conclusion, real-time posting enhances the user experience by making the web app feel more interactive and responsive. It also allows for more efficient communication and collaboration among users.

Once suspended, luckey will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, luckey will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by luckey will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If luckey is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Report other inappropriate conduct
